title: Urban Nomad C4d Dopamine Marketing Poster AI
sourceTitle: Urban Nomad C4d Dopamine Marketing Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Top-tier internet marketing visual design poster for Urban Nomad Project, using Behance and Dribbble inspired 3D illustration energy. Subject: Top-tier internet marketing visual design, Behance / Dribbble inspired 3D illustration poster aesthetic, C4D rendering style, soft-light treatment, vivid high-saturation colors, dopamine-driven color palette, abstract carries the Urban Nomad Project idea with polished abstract artwork, youthful energetic mood, and clear campaign focus. Scene: Clean minimalist background with rounded C4D shapes, map pins, soft clouds, abstract transit lines, and glossy capsules, soft-light treatment, vivid high-saturation colors, and fresh lively internet-marketing atmosphere. Composition: Single polished poster composition with the main visual centered or slightly offset, abstract forms arranged for rhythm, optional readable title URBAN NOMAD PROJECT with one small subtitle only, and enough negative space to feel premium. Signature Elements: Preserved urban nomad c4d dopamine marketing poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Main Visual: floating modular city backpack, stylized route ribbons, and compact travel-tech objects; Color Mood: dopamine orange, cyan, lime, pink, and clean white. Style: Behance / Dribbble inspired 3D illustration poster aesthetic, C4D rendering style, dopamine-driven color palette, polished intricate surfaces, soft light, and modern digital marketing finish. Color Palette: Top-tier internet marketing visual design, Behance / Dribbble inspired 3D illustration poster aesthetic, C4D rendering style, soft-light treatment, vivid high-saturation colors, dopamine-driven color palette, abstract with vivid high-saturation accents, clean bright background, playful gradients inside 3D objects only, and fresh youthful contrast. Lighting: Soft C4D studio lighting, gentle highlights on glossy objects, vivid color bounce, clean shadow grounding, and polished ad-poster readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
